exploration_notes:
Found 5 concrete implementors of AggregatedDiscoveryServiceServer across the three repos:

1. **go-control-plane `server`** (pkg/server/v3/server.go:179) — The reference xDS server implementation in the SDK. Unexported struct, implements both StreamAggregatedResources and DeltaAggregatedResources by delegating to sotw.Server and delta.Server.
